MASTER CALENDAR MOTION ON APR-24-2013 IN DEPT. 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/PLAINTIFF TUAN PHAN'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT DENIED THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE.
